user.title: Smart Thermostat - Core entities
user.description: Choose the air conditioner to manage and the base sensors.

data_description.name: Display name in Home Assistant. E.g. 'Master bedroom', 'Living room upstairs'.
data_description.climate_entity: The physical AC unit this thermostat will control.
data_description.temp_sensor: Room temperature probe, ideally placed away from the AC.
data_description.window_sensor: Binary sensor that turns 'on' when the window is open. If left open, AC turns off after a delay.
data_description.presence_sensor: If set and presence is detected continuously, the fan can be boosted after X minutes. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.door_sensor: If set, sends an alert when the door opens. Never acts on the AC. Leave empty to disable.

energia.title: Solar and battery
energia.description: Configure FV sensors and automatic turn-on/off parameters. All sensors are optional.

data.fv_margin_w: Solar surplus margin required to turn on (W)
data.soc_min: Minimum battery SOC to turn on (%)
data.fv_stagger_minutes: Minimum gap between cascade turn-ons / turn-offs (min)
data.fv_shutoff_enabled: ▶ Automatic turn-off when solar is insufficient (on/off)
data.fv_shutoff_delay_min: Minutes of insufficient solar before turning off
data.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: Extra hours after window end where turn-off stays active

data_description.fv_sensor: Instantaneous power from the panels. E.g. sensor.solar_production.
data_description.battery_sensor: Battery state of charge in percent.
data_description.fv_margin_w: Minimum surplus to turn on: solar must exceed (consumption + margin). E.g. 1200 W.
data_description.soc_min: The AC won't turn on from solar if battery is below this percentage. E.g. 70.
data_description.fv_start_time: The AC won't turn on automatically from solar before this time. E.g. 10:00.
data_description.fv_end_time: The AC won't turn on automatically from solar after this time. Turn-off can continue beyond.
data_description.fv_priority: With multiple thermostats, lower numbers turn on first and turn off last.
data_description.fv_stagger_minutes: How many minutes to wait between one cascade turn-on (or turn-off) and the next. E.g. 5 minutes.
data_description.fv_shutoff_enabled: If enabled: when solar drops below consumption for the configured delay, AC turns off. With multiple thermostats the cascade is the reverse of turn-on.
data_description.fv_shutoff_delay_min: How many minutes solar must stay insufficient before turning off. Avoids shutdowns for passing clouds. E.g. 5 minutes.
data_description.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: After the solar window ends, the AC can still be turned off for this many hours. E.g. window ends at 16:00, extra 1h → turn-off active until 17:00.

profilo.title: Regulation profile
profilo.description: Choose a preconfigured profile or Custom to set every parameter manually.

data_description.profile: Balanced: gradual regulation. Aggressive: cools faster. Gentle: minimal changes, quiet. Custom: set every threshold manually in the next step.

soglie_termiche.title: Thermal thresholds
soglie_termiche.description: Define how the thermostat reacts to different room temperatures relative to the target.

data.below_offset: Margin below target for low fan (°C)
data.turn_on_offset: Minimum offset above target to turn on from solar (°C)
data.temp_delta: Regulation delta applied to the setpoint (°C)

data_description.target_temp_default: Comfort temperature. E.g. 25°C. Changeable anytime from the climate card.
data_description.extreme_offset: Above target + this: high fan, very low setpoint. E.g. offset 2°C, target 25°C → extreme above 27°C.
data_description.hot_offset: Above target + this (but below extreme): medium fan, low setpoint. E.g. 1.5°C → strong above 26.5°C.
data_description.range_offset: Above target + this (but below strong): low fan, reduced setpoint. E.g. 0.2°C → mild above 25.2°C.
data_description.below_offset: Between target and target - this: low fan, setpoint = target. E.g. 0.1°C → band 24.9–25°C.
data_description.turn_on_offset: Turns on from solar only if room > target + this. E.g. 0.8°C → turns on only above 25.8°C.
data_description.temp_delta: How much the setpoint is lowered in warm/strong bands. E.g. 1°C → sends 24°C with target 25°C.
data_description.extreme_delta: Like temp_delta but for the extreme band. E.g. 2°C → sends 23°C in extreme heat.

soglie_avanzate.title: Advanced functions
soglie_avanzate.description: Calibration, night mode, night turn-off, presence boost and timing.

data.min_below_internal: Minimum setpoint margin below AC internal sensor (°C)
data.night_offset: Night target offset: effective target = target + this value (°C)
data.night_ac_enabled: ▶ Automatic night turn-on when too hot (on/off)
data.night_turn_on_offset: Night turn-on threshold above night target (°C)
data.night_shutoff_enabled: ▶ Automatic night turn-off when room is at target temperature (on/off)
data.night_shutoff_delta: Tolerance above night target to consider room 'at temperature' (°C)
data.night_shutoff_min: Consecutive minutes at temperature before night turn-off
data.presence_boost_enabled: ▶ Fan boost if continuous presence and still warm (on/off)
data.presence_boost_minutes: Continuous presence minutes before fan boost
data.presence_boost_offset: Minimum offset above target to trigger presence boost (°C)
data.window_delay_minutes: Minutes with window open before turning off the AC

data_description.calibration_max_offset: The AC's internal sensor often reads differently from the room. The thermostat compensates by at most this many degrees. E.g. 3°C.
data_description.min_below_internal: In active heat bands, the setpoint always stays at least this far below the AC's own reading. E.g. 1°C → if AC reads 24°C, setpoint never exceeds 23°C.
data_description.night_start_time: Night mode starts at this time. Can span midnight. E.g. 23:00.
data_description.night_end_time: Night mode ends at this time. E.g. 07:00.
data_description.night_offset: At night the effective target becomes target + this. E.g. target 25°C, offset 1°C → night target 26°C. Set 0 to keep unchanged.
data_description.night_ac_enabled: If enabled: at night, if the room exceeds night target + threshold, the AC turns on automatically without solar surplus.
data_description.night_turn_on_offset: E.g. target 25°C, night offset 1°C → night target 26°C. With offset 1.5°C → turns on automatically only above 27.5°C.
data_description.night_shutoff_enabled: If enabled: at night, if the room stays at temperature for the configured minutes, the AC turns off automatically. Works with any turn-on method.
data_description.night_shutoff_delta: E.g. night target 26°C, delta 0.3°C → 'at temperature' when temp ≤ 26.3°C. If temp rises, timer resets.
data_description.night_shutoff_min: E.g. 30 minutes → if temp rises above threshold during those 30 minutes, count resets to zero.
data_description.presence_boost_enabled: If enabled: when presence is detected continuously for the configured minutes and room is still above target + offset, fan is raised to medium.
data_description.presence_boost_minutes: E.g. 10 minutes of continuous presence before boost.
data_description.presence_boost_offset: Boost only if temp > target + this. E.g. 1°C → boost only if still above 26°C with target 25°C.
data_description.window_delay_minutes: How many minutes to wait after the window opens before turning off. E.g. 5 minutes.
data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often the thermostat recalculates and updates the AC. E.g. 5 minutes.

notifiche.title: Voice and Telegram alerts
notifiche.description: Configure Google devices and Telegram channels. Messages support Jinja2 template variables.

data.tts_media_players: Google / media_player devices for voice announcements
data.tts_message_open: Voice message when window is open
data.notify_targets: Notify entities to send messages to
data.notify_chat_ids: Telegram chat IDs (only if no notify entity selected)
data.notify_message: Message sent when AC is turned off due to open window
data.notify_temp_change_enabled: ▶ Send Telegram notification on every AC temperature change (on/off)
data.notify_temp_change_message: Message sent on each AC temperature change
data.notify_power_tts: ▶ Google Home voice alert on automatic turn-on/off (on/off)
data.door_alert_tts: ▶ Door alert via Google Home voice (on/off)
data.door_alert_message: Message sent when the door opens

data_description.tts_media_players: Select Google Home / Nest or media_player devices for voice. E.g. media_player.google_bedroom.
data_description.tts_engine_entity: TTS engine to use. Leave empty for auto-detection.
data_description.notify_targets: Configured notify entities in HA. E.g. notify.telegram_me.
data_description.notify_chat_ids: Telegram chat IDs separated by commas. Used only if no notify entity selected above.
data_description.notify_temp_change_enabled: If enabled: every new setpoint sent to the AC generates a Telegram message. Can be verbose.
data_description.notify_temp_change_message: Variables: {{ name }}, {{ old_temp }}, {{ new_temp }}, {{ fan_mode }}, {{ room_temp }}, {{ target }}.
data_description.notify_power_tts: If enabled: voice announcement when the AC turns on/off automatically, explaining the reason. E.g. 'I turned on the bedroom AC because you are producing 2800W of solar power'.
data_description.notify_power_notify: If enabled: Telegram message when the AC turns on/off automatically, explaining the reason. Enabled by default so you don't miss automatic activations.
data_description.door_alert_enabled: Master switch for door alerts. If disabled, the voice and Telegram toggles below are ignored.
data_description.door_alert_tts: If enabled: plays door alert on Google devices when door opens. Bypasses quiet hours (urgent alert).
data_description.door_alert_notify: If enabled: sends door alert on Telegram when door opens. Bypasses quiet hours (urgent alert).
data_description.door_alert_message: Variable: {{ name }}. Informational only: never turns off the AC.

silenzio.title: Quiet hours
silenzio.description: During quiet hours, automatic turn-on/off alerts can be suppressed on one or both channels. Urgent alerts (window open, door) are never suppressed.

data.quiet_tts: ▶ Suppress Google Home voice alerts during quiet hours (on/off)
data.quiet_notify: ▶ Suppress Telegram messages during quiet hours (on/off)

data_description.quiet_enabled: If enabled: during the configured window, automatic turn-on/off alerts are filtered according to the toggles below. Urgent alerts (window, door) are always sent.
data_description.quiet_start_time: Start of the quiet period. Can span midnight. E.g. 23:00.
data_description.quiet_end_time: End of the quiet period. E.g. 07:00.
data_description.quiet_tts: If enabled: Google Home voice alerts are suppressed during quiet hours. Useful to avoid being woken up by 'I turned on the AC'.
data_description.quiet_notify: If enabled: Telegram turn-on/off messages are suppressed during quiet hours. Off by default: Telegram notifications usually don't disturb sleep.

abort.already_configured: This air conditioner is already managed by another Smart Thermostat instance.

data_description.name: Display name in Home Assistant.
data_description.window_sensor: Binary sensor that turns 'on' when the window is open.
data_description.presence_sensor: Enables fan boost for continuous presence. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.door_sensor: Sends door open alert. Leave empty to disable.

data.fv_margin_w: Solar surplus margin required to turn on (W)
data.soc_min: Minimum battery SOC to turn on (%)
data.fv_stagger_minutes: Minimum gap between cascade turn-ons / turn-offs (min)
data.fv_shutoff_enabled: ▶ Automatic turn-off when solar is insufficient (on/off)
data.fv_shutoff_delay_min: Minutes of insufficient solar before turning off
data.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: Extra hours after window end where turn-off stays active

data_description.fv_shutoff_enabled: If enabled: when solar drops below consumption for the configured delay, AC turns off. Cascade is reverse of turn-on.
data_description.fv_shutoff_delay_min: How many minutes solar must stay insufficient before turning off.
data_description.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: After the solar window ends, the AC can still be turned off for this many hours.
data_description.fv_priority: Lower number = higher priority: turned on first, turned off last.

data_description.profile: Balanced: gradual. Aggressive: cools faster. Gentle: quiet. Custom: set manually.

data.below_offset: Margin below target for low fan (°C)
data.turn_on_offset: Minimum offset above target to turn on from solar (°C)
data.temp_delta: Regulation delta applied to the setpoint (°C)

data_description.extreme_offset: Above target + this: high fan, very low setpoint.
data_description.hot_offset: Above target + this: medium fan, low setpoint.
data_description.range_offset: Above target + this: low fan, reduced setpoint.
data_description.turn_on_offset: Turns on from solar only if room > target + this.

data.min_below_internal: Minimum setpoint margin below AC internal sensor (°C)
data.night_turn_on_offset: Night turn-on threshold above night target (°C)
data.night_shutoff_delta: Tolerance above night target to consider 'at temperature' (°C)
data.night_shutoff_min: Consecutive minutes at temperature before night turn-off
data.presence_boost_offset: Minimum offset above target for presence boost (°C)
data.window_delay_minutes: Minutes with window open before turning off the AC

data_description.night_ac_enabled: At night, if room exceeds night target + threshold, AC turns on without solar surplus.
data_description.night_shutoff_enabled: At night, if room stays at temperature for the configured minutes, AC turns off automatically.
data_description.night_shutoff_delta: E.g. night target 26°C, delta 0.3°C → 'at temperature' when temp ≤ 26.3°C.
data_description.night_shutoff_min: E.g. 30 min → if temp rises during those 30 minutes, count resets to zero.

data.tts_message_open: Voice message when window is open
data.notify_targets: Notify entities to send messages to
data.notify_chat_ids: Telegram chat IDs (only if no notify entity)
data.notify_message: Message when AC is turned off due to open window
data.notify_temp_change_enabled: ▶ Telegram notification on every AC temperature change (on/off)
data.notify_power_tts: ▶ Google Home voice alert on automatic turn-on/off (on/off)
data.door_alert_tts: ▶ Door alert via Google Home voice (on/off)

data_description.notify_power_tts: If enabled: voice announcement when AC turns on/off automatically, explaining the reason.
data_description.notify_power_notify: If enabled: Telegram message when AC turns on/off automatically, explaining the reason.
data_description.door_alert_enabled: Master switch. If disabled, voice and Telegram toggles below are ignored.

silenzio.title: Quiet hours
silenzio.description: During quiet hours, automatic turn-on/off alerts can be suppressed. Urgent alerts (window, door) are never suppressed.

data.quiet_tts: ▶ Suppress Google Home voice alerts during quiet hours (on/off)
data.quiet_notify: ▶ Suppress Telegram messages during quiet hours (on/off)

data_description.quiet_enabled: If enabled: automatic turn-on/off alerts are filtered during the configured window. Urgent alerts are always sent.
data_description.quiet_start_time: Start of quiet period. Can span midnight. E.g. 23:00.
data_description.quiet_tts: If enabled: Google Home voice alerts are suppressed during quiet hours.
data_description.quiet_notify: If enabled: Telegram turn-on/off messages are suppressed during quiet hours.
